HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT CONTRACT: Halt Illegal Surveillance 
CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent 
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: Hurston Dynamics
RISK ASSESSMENT: Hurston Dynamics 
RUSH CONTRACT: Hurston Dynamics

An illegal surveillance network has been detected at [Location|Address]. It is estimated that the Hurston Dynamics have been hidden around the area to illicitly collect data. You'll need to scan the area to locate their whereabouts.

All of the monitors must be found and destroyed. They will attempt an emergency upload of all the information stored on the data-drives when attacked. They must be destroyed before this upload can complete.

** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

RUSH CONTRACT: Hurston Dynamics

A convicted data-trader has been persuaded to reveal their source of illegal information - the Hurston Dynamics hidden over at [Location|Address]. 

Their low EM signature will make finding them difficult, but scan the area carefully as all of the monitors must be found and destroyed. These devices are outfitted with a countermeasure that will initiate an emergency upload of all the information stored on the data-drives once they are attacked. The monitors must be terminated before they can transfer their stolen information.

** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT CONTRACT: Halt Illegal Surveillance 
CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent 
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: Hurston Dynamics
RISK ASSESSMENT: Hurston Dynamics 
RUSH CONTRACT: Hurston Dynamics

A recent undercover operation successfully tracked down the source of unauthorized Hurston data that recently surfaced on the black market. The source of the leak was successfully traced to the Hurston Dynamics hidden at [Location|Address]. 

Scan the area, locate the skimmers and destroy them. Be aware that they may attempt to upload their data-drives once you initiate your attack. Do not allow the transfer to complete. We cannot afford the loss of any more sensitive information.

** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **
